Collection Two

Signature Glass Jars

Our signature dome glass jars are available individually as an add-on to any diffuser you order, at an additional price. Choose from three colourways — green globe, smoke hourglass, or cobalt vase.

Add-On · Available Individually
SIGNATURE GLASS JARS

Signature Glass Jar Diffusers

Our signature dome glass jars — available individually in three colourways: green globe, smoke hourglass, and cobalt vase. Each is sold as an add-on to any diffuser size at an additional price. Choose your jar and pair it with any fragrance oil.

Available Individually · Add-On to Any Diffuser
ⓘ

How it works: Choose any diffuser size (100ml–500ml), then add a signature glass jar of your choice at an additional price. The jar holds your chosen diffuser bottle inside, creating a beautiful display piece for any room.

Collection Three

Glass Decanters

Our sculptural carafe decanter is available alone as a statement vessel, or paired with any diffuser size of your choice. Pairs best with 500ml or 1 litre refill for maximum fragrance life.

Statement Vessel
GLASS DECANTER

1 Litre Decanter + 500ml

The carafe decanter paired with a 500ml reed diffuser. Buy the decanter alone as a statement vessel, or order it together with any diffuser size of your choice.

1 Litre · 500ml Refill
1 Litre Decanter + 1L Refill
1 Litre · Order with Any Diffuser Size
GLASS DECANTER
1 Litre Decanter + Refill

The sculptural carafe decanter shown with a 1 litre fragrance oil refill. The decanter can be bought alone or paired with any diffuser size from 100ml to 1 litre.

1 Litre · Order with Any Diffuser Size
Flexible Pairing

The decanter can be purchased alone or paired with any diffuser size from 100ml to 1 litre. We recommend pairing with 500ml or 1 litre for the best experience and value.

Available · Buy Alone or Bundle

“Every room has a story. Let yours be told in scent.”
